name: Organic Bananas
description: Fresh organic bananas, naturally ripened. Rich in potassium and perfect for smoothies or snacking.

name: Red Apples
description: Crisp and sweet red apples. Great for eating fresh, baking, or making juice.

name: Strawberries
description: Juicy fresh strawberries picked at peak ripeness. Perfect for desserts and smoothies.

name: Avocados
description: Ripe and ready-to-eat avocados. Great for guacamole, toast, or salads.

name: Fresh Oranges
description: Navel oranges bursting with citrus flavor. High in vitamin C.

name: Blueberries
description: Plump wild blueberries packed with antioxidants. Perfect for cereals and baking.

name: Mangoes
description: Sweet Alphonso mangoes imported fresh. The king of fruits.

name: Grapes
description: Seedless green grapes, crisp and refreshing. Great for snacking.

name: Fresh Broccoli
description: Crisp green broccoli florets. Packed with vitamins and fiber.

name: Organic Carrots
description: Sweet organic carrots grown without pesticides. Great for cooking or juicing.

name: Tomatoes
description: Fresh vine-ripened tomatoes perfect for sauces, salads, and everyday cooking.

name: Baby Spinach
description: Tender baby spinach leaves, pre-washed and ready to eat. Rich in iron.

name: Bell Peppers
description: Mixed color bell peppers — red, yellow, and green. Crunchy and sweet.

name: Sweet Potatoes
description: Naturally sweet and packed with beta-carotene. Great roasted or mashed.

name: Fresh Corn
description: Sweet corn on the cob. Perfect for grilling or boiling.

name: Cucumber
description: Fresh and crisp cucumbers. Ideal for salads and refreshing snacks.

name: Whole Milk
description: Farm-fresh whole milk, pasteurized and homogenized. Rich and creamy.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick and creamy Greek yogurt with live cultures. High in protein.

name: Cheddar Cheese
description: Sharp aged cheddar cheese. Perfect for sandwiches, burgers, and snacking.

name: Fresh Eggs
description: Free-range eggs from pasture-raised hens. Great for breakfast or baking.

name: Butter
description: Unsalted cultured butter made from grass-fed cream. Rich flavor.

name: Cream Cheese
description: Smooth and spreadable cream cheese. Great on bagels and in recipes.

name: Mozzarella
description: Fresh buffalo mozzarella. Perfect for caprese, pizza, and pasta.

name: Sourdough Bread
description: Artisan sourdough bread with a crispy crust and tangy flavor. Naturally leavened.

name: Croissants
description: Buttery, flaky French croissants. Baked fresh daily.

name: Bagels
description: New York-style bagels — chewy inside, crisp outside. Everything flavor.

name: Banana Muffins
description: Moist banana walnut muffins made with real bananas. Perfect breakfast treat.

name: Whole Wheat Bread
description: 100% whole wheat bread with seeds. Healthy, hearty, and delicious.

name: Cinnamon Rolls
description: Warm cinnamon rolls with cream cheese frosting. A sweet indulgence.

name: Baguette
description: Classic French baguette with a golden crust. Perfect with cheese and soup.

name: Orange Juice
description: Freshly squeezed orange juice. No added sugar or preservatives.

name: Green Tea
description: Premium Japanese green tea bags. Rich in antioxidants, smooth taste.

name: Sparkling Water
description: Natural sparkling mineral water. Zero calories, refreshing fizz.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
description: Slow-steeped cold brew coffee concentrate. Smooth, bold, and never bitter.

name: Coconut Water
description: Pure coconut water with natural electrolytes. Hydrating and refreshing.

name: Almond Milk
description: Unsweetened almond milk. Dairy-free, low calorie, and creamy.

name: Lemonade
description: Classic fresh-squeezed lemonade. Sweet, tangy, and refreshing.

name: Potato Chips
description: Kettle-cooked potato chips with sea salt. Extra crunchy and satisfying.

name: Mixed Nuts
description: Premium roasted mixed nuts — almonds, cashews, pecans, and walnuts.

name: Dark Chocolate
description: 72% cacao dark chocolate. Smooth, rich, and ethically sourced.

name: Trail Mix
description: Energizing trail mix with dried fruits, nuts, and dark chocolate chips.

name: Rice Crackers
description: Light and crispy rice crackers with soy glaze. A savory snack.

name: Granola Bars
description: Chewy oat granola bars with honey and almonds. No artificial flavors.

name: Pretzels
description: Classic twisted pretzels with coarse salt. Baked, not fried.

name: Watermelon
description: Sweet seedless watermelon. Juicy summer refreshment at its best.

name: Garlic
description: Aromatic fresh garlic. Essential for adding depth to any dish.

name: Mushrooms
description: Fresh cremini mushrooms. Earthy flavor, great sautéed or in soups.

name: Honey
description: Raw unfiltered wildflower honey. Natural sweetness from local apiaries.

name: Pineapple
description: Golden ripe pineapple. Tropical sweetness with a tangy kick.

name: Oat Milk
description: Creamy barista-style oat milk. Perfect for lattes and cereals.

name: Onion
description: Fresh onions, a kitchen essential. Perfect for curries, soups, salads, and stir-fries.

name: Ginger
description: Fresh ginger root with a warm, spicy kick. Great for teas, curries, and stir-fries.

name: Fresh Coriander
description: Aromatic fresh coriander leaves (cilantro). Essential garnish for Indian and Asian dishes.

name: Potato
description: Versatile fresh potatoes. Perfect for frying, boiling, mashing, roasting, or curries.
